item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 21 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. http-date v0.2 — Zero-dependency HTTP date parsing for OCaml
  2. Caqti 2.3.0
  3. layoutz 0.1.0 🪶 - Zero-dep Elm-style TUIs and terminal plots for your OCaml apps
  4. Dune 3.22
  5. ptt, a mailing list system as unikernel
  6. Mollymawk and Albatross orchestrating all virtual machines
  7. OUPS meetup april 2026
  8. Stk 0.6 released
  9. opam 2.5.1
  10. Restarting OCaml.jp: The OCaml Japan User Group
  11. Code navigation and search on Github
  12. Seeking maintainers for our OCaml SIP server, gRPC, and HTTP/2 libraries
  13. ppx_mixins: slightly more elegant mixin syntax
  14. Experience Report: Refining Dune’s Dependency Graph
  15. First beta release of OCaml 5.5.0
  16. ocgtk 0.1: OCaml bindings for GTK 4 (preview release)
